reviews.review_title: Grateful for a VR Cornhole game
reviews.review_description: Very glad the developer has created a game based on cornhole.  With the latest update the throwing motion is much more realistic and the game is a lot more fun.

I always look for social games. I've had this a few months and have played solo a few times. It's ok. The throwing motion seems a little awkward still but I'm getting better. I've not yet had any friends buy the game so we could try multiplayer. That will be the real test for me, how smooth the process of joining is and the competitiveness and sociability of the multiplayer game.

I unlocked the game and didn't observe a way to START playing! I read tips and guidance, but the game never provided an option to PLAY. Please advise. 
Princess
